{{Infobox technique
| name = Foxtail
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Foxtail]] is a skill used by [[White Fox Enforcers]] to deceive opponents by making their movements appear different than they are.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Foxtail]] is an [[Enforcer]] attack technique that bends light and perception to hide movement.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Foxtail]] technique to conceal his movements.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
